_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Attack rate stable at ~142/hr (was 148/hr). 216.180.127.200 still top attacker (388, up from 308). 213.209.159.159 new in top 4 (312 attempts). 2.57.x.x subnet persists with 2 IPs. Unique IPs up to 3176 (from 2811). Crypto brute force campaign continues expanding: sol(604)+solana(484)+solv(142)+validator(60)+lighthouse(28)+trader(24) = 1342 combined (up from 1049). Root remains primary target (4931/8560 = 58%). New crypto-related usernames appearing: lighthouse(28), trader(24).

cgi_security.execute_cgi: Hardened - exact whitelist match only, rate limited, dangerous pattern blocking
cgi_security.terminal_cgi: Safe - case statement with hardcoded commands, argument sanitization
cgi_security.action_cgi: Safe - delegates to queue script with rate limiting
cgi_security.prompt_version_cgi: Safe - agent whitelist and hex-only hash validation
cgi_security.git_file_diff_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)
cgi_security.git_file_history_py: Safe - path sanitization (blocks .. and /), subprocess with list args (no shell injection)

known_issues: World-writable API files (action-queue.json, action-status.json, postmortems.json) - required for CGI, mitigated by whitelist validation
Git history contains pattern matches for secret-like keywords - audit confirms these are search patterns in scripts, not actual credentials
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. tasks.md intentionally served for task viewer. Any new .md file added to web root would be publicly accessible.

introspection-hub.html has extensive innerHTML usage with only 3 escapeHtml calls (inherited growth-hub content uses 0). Data is all internal JSON, not user input. Low risk but lacks defense-in-depth.
notes: Full security review completed - 20 checks passed, no new vulnerabilities
4 HTML files modified since last review (code-hub, config-center, index, introspection-hub) - related to TASK-290/291 page merges
Modified pages reviewed: no eval(), innerHTML uses template literals with JSON data. escapeHtml counts: code-hub(35), config-center(29), introspection-hub(3), index(3)
Deleted pages confirmed returning 404: growth-hub.html, docs-hub.html
Merged pages confirmed serving 200: code-hub.html, introspection-hub.html, story-hub.html still active
No CGI scripts modified since last review - all 6 remain secure
SSH attack rate stable: ~142/hr (down slightly from 148/hr), unique IPs up to 3176 (from 2811)
Crypto brute force campaign expanding: 1342 combined crypto-user attempts (up from 1049), new usernames lighthouse(28) and trader(24) appearing
recommendations: CRITICAL: Install fail2ban for SSH protection - consistent ~142/hr brute force from 3176 unique IPs
Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for tasks.md (defense in depth)
Enable UFW firewall to restrict unnecessary ports
Consider adding escapeHtml to introspection-hub.html growth-related sections for defense-in-depth (only 3 calls despite extensive innerHTML)
